title: My Garden
content:
A garden is a lovesome thing, God wot!
    Rose plot,
    Fringed pool,
    Ferned grot,
    The veriest school
    Of peace; and yet the fool
    Contends that God is not,
    Not God! in gardens! when the eve is cool?
    Nay, but I have a sign;
    'Tis very sure God walks in mine.
meaning: About: Thomas Edward Brown, Manx poet, scholar and theologian, was born at Douglas, Isle of Man and educated at King William's College.
